description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Deliverable:
Rewrite SpecLedEx.Review.Html around the master–detail structure per
specled.decision.spec_review_change_scoped_master_detail and the approved mockup
(https://claude.ai/code/artifact/e21fe2c1-642b-4a91-a6e3-ee835f9f7414):
(a) top bar with base…head refs, diffstat, change-verdict chip, theme toggle;
(b) left-rail review queue (Overview, Decisions changed, subjects grouped by change
kind with finding dot / spec chip / file count, Outside the spec system, All files,
Spec health) with filter input, j/k keys, and URL-fragment deep links;
(c) change-scoped Overview pane (verdict headline, diff-scoped tiles, findings delta
rows from S1, spec-edits card, file breakdown meter, decisions changed) with NO
whole-repo inventories or triangle;
(d) Spec health pane holding the triangle strip, per-leg check accordions, strength
inventory, and full findings inventory, headed as repo state at <head ref>;
(e) findings digest rows deduped by (code, reason) with counts and subject links —
used on both Overview (delta rows) and Spec health (inventory);
(f) theme: all colors via CSS custom-property tokens, light + dark sets,
prefers-color-scheme default, system/light/dark toggle persisted to localStorage;
degraded state renders neutral grey with ? glyph (not amber). Artifact stays fully
self-contained (no external resources) and read-only.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs (new; flip the
  spec-verification stub covering review_queue_navigation / change_scoped_overview /
  repo_state_health_pane / findings_digest_dedup / theme_tokens to execute: true),
  mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs and
  test/mix/tasks/spec_review_task_test.exs (updated for new DOM, no regressions)
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenarios queue_selects_subject_detail,
  overview_excludes_repo_state, duplicate_findings_dedup, theme_defaults_and_override,
  clean_pr_collapses, degraded_leg_renders_with_question_mark

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/review.ex (view-model is S1's contract — consume, don't change)
- lib/specled_ex/verifier*.ex
- lib/specled_ex/coverage_triangulation.ex
Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex
- priv/spec_review_assets/** (dual-theme Prism CSS if needed)
- test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs
- test/mix/tasks/spec_review_task_test.exs
- .spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md (verification stub flips only)
- .spec/state.json (regenerated)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Subject detail pane internals (pivots, coverage ordering) belong to S3 — this stage
  may render subject panes with the v1 tab internals unchanged
- No acceptance state, forms, or network calls (read_only_viewer, html_artifact hold)
- No JS frameworks or build steps — hand-rolled vanilla JS as today

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly (mix compile --warnings-as-errors)
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes (mix spec.check)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: agent-aimpl-specled-7md-2-df19dcfd8b63a7db
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/b4c28666-8ce9-4a61-922a-352ab59212b4/subagents/agent-aimpl-specled-7md-2-df19dcfd8b63a7db.jsonl

Commit: 8620d0d
Files touched:
- lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex (master-detail rewrite of the page shell)
- test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs (new)
- .spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md (verification stub flip only)
- .spec/state.json (regenerated by spec.check)
Tests added: SpecLedEx.Review.HtmlLayoutTest — 14 tests across:
  review_queue_navigation (queue lists every unit; per-subject deep-linkable
  panes; exactly one active pane; grouped rows with dot/chip/file-count;
  fragment + j/k JS), change_scoped_overview (tiles present, no triangle/
  inventories), repo_state_health_pane (triangle + strength + findings under
  head-ref heading), findings_digest_dedup (23→1 row ×23 with 23 subject
  links; distinct pairs distinct rows), theme_tokens (light+dark sets,
  prefers-color-scheme default, data-theme overrides, 3-state toggle,
  localStorage persistence), triage_panel clean_pr (clean chip + headline, no
  severity counts), degraded_leg_state (neutral ? glyph, partial badge, verdict
  not flipped).
Verification stubs flipped: mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs
  → execute: true, covering review_queue_navigation, change_scoped_overview,
  repo_state_health_pane, findings_digest_dedup, theme_tokens. Split
  coverage_pivot_touched_first onto its own execute: false stub
  (html_coverage_pivot_test.exs) for S3.

Summary: Rewrote the spec.review renderer as a master-detail review queue with
a hard change/repo-state split. The top bar carries the differential
change-verdict chip and a system/light/dark theme toggle; the left rail is a
filterable queue (Overview, Decisions, subjects grouped by change kind with
finding dot / spec chip / file count, Outside-the-spec, All files, Spec
health) with j/k keys and URL-fragment deep links driving a single visible
detail pane. Overview is change-scoped only (verdict headline, diff tiles,
findings delta digest, spec edits, file-breakdown meter, decisions); Spec
health holds all whole-repo state (triangle, per-leg checks, strength + repo
inventories, full findings digest) under a "repo state at <head>" heading,
with degraded legs rendered neutral grey + ? glyph rather than amber. Findings
dedup by (code, reason) into digest rows with expandable subject links, shared
by both panes. Theme flows entirely through dual light/dark CSS custom-property
token sets defaulting to prefers-color-scheme, overridable via data-theme and
persisted to localStorage with a no-flash inline bootstrap. All tested
component functions were preserved so html_test.exs / spec_review_task_test.exs
pass with no regressions; subject detail tab internals are untouched (S3's
scope).

Merge gates: mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean; mix test 918 tests 0
failures; mix format --check-formatted clean; mix deps.unlock --check-unused
clean; mix spec.check down to the single expected coverage_pivot_touched_first
warning (S3's job) — all five requirements this stage owns are resolved.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: agent-averify-specled-7md-2-f8ccfbb3ad0ecfab
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/b4c28666-8ce9-4a61-922a-352ab59212b4/subagents/agent-averify-specled-7md-2-f8ccfbb3ad0ecfab.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 4 (.spec/specs/spec_review.spec.md, .spec/state.json, lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex, test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs)
- Files outside Allowed globs: 0
- Files matching Out-of-Scope globs: 0
- spec_review.spec.md diff is stub-flip only (flip html_layout stub to execute:true; split coverage_pivot_touched_first onto its own execute:false stub) — no requirement text changed. Within the "verification stub flips only" allowance.

Semantic checks:
- Spec stubs run: this ticket's flipped stub `mix test test/specled_ex/review/html_layout_test.exs` passes (14 tests). All other execute:true stubs pass via full suite (918 tests, 0 failures).
- Requirements coverage (5 must-requirements this stage owns):
  - review_queue_navigation: covered by html_layout_test.exs:86,114,126,141. Would fail if render() marked 0 or 2+ panes .active (line 118 asserts exactly one), if a fixed unit lost its #unit-X row/pane, or if the j/k+hashchange+queue-current+aria-current JS were removed. Read the JS at html.ex:5152-5218 — selectPane toggles exactly one .active pane and marks queue-current/aria-current; j/k genuinely drives location.hash; CSS .detail-pane{display:none}/.active{display:block} enforces one visible unit.
  - change_scoped_overview: covered by html_layout_test.exs:154. Would fail if the Overview pane emitted sync-edge / strength-inventory / repo-inventory. Confirmed render_overview (html.ex:290) is actually called (page template line 89) and genuinely renders the 4 change-scoped tiles + findings delta + spec edits + file breakdown + decisions, and never calls render_sync_diagram/inventories — the absence-check is not vacuous.
  - repo_state_health_pane: covered by html_layout_test.exs:172. Would fail if the health pane dropped sync-edge / strength-inventory / findings-digest or the "repo state at <head_ref>" heading. render_spec_health (html.ex:481) renders all of these under a distinct pane, separate from Overview.
  - findings_digest_dedup: covered by html_layout_test.exs:188,217. Would fail if the dedup key changed (e.g. 23 same-(code,reason) findings rendered >1 row, or distinct pairs collapsed). Read the impl: Enum.group_by(fn f -> {f["code"], f["reason"]} end) at html.ex:570 — dedup key is genuinely (code, reason), count=length(items), subjects uniq'd with per-subject queue links.
  - theme_tokens: covered by html_layout_test.exs:229,243,258. Would fail if the dark token set, prefers-color-scheme media query, :root:not([data-theme=light]) gating, :root[data-theme=dark] override, 3-state toggle, or localStorage get/set were removed, or if body stopped painting from var() tokens. Read the actual CSS (html.ex:2935-3014) and JS (5113-5136, bootstrap 5092-5108): correct three-way system, prefers-color-scheme default, data-theme override, persisted to localStorage 'specled-theme'; body uses background:var(--bg);color:var(--fg).
- Also demonstrated (owned by sibling execute:true stubs, not this ticket's gap): triage_panel clean_pr and degraded_leg_state pass in html_layout_test.exs:267,309.
- Intent-level scope concerns: none. No <form>, no fetch/XHR/WebSocket, no external URLs; JS is hand-rolled vanilla; mix.exs/mix.lock untouched (no new frameworks/deps); read-only holds.
- Source-claim tracing: 5 of 6 verification_target_missing_reference warnings resolved by # covers: markers wired at real rendering functions — review_queue_navigation@122(render_queue), change_scoped_overview@285(render_overview), repo_state_health_pane@475(render_spec_health), findings_digest_dedup@559(render_findings_digest), theme_tokens@269(render_theme_toggle)+@5090(css). The 6th (coverage_pivot_touched_first) marker is correctly absent — deferred to S3.
- Degraded rendering: sync-edge-degraded uses var(--fg-faint)/var(--fg-muted) (neutral grey) with a `?` glyph (html.ex:822, 3381-3384), NOT --warning/amber. queue-badge-degraded is neutral. Confirmed not left amber.
- Project verification: `mix spec.check` emits exactly 1 warning — verification_target_missing_reference for specled.spec_review.coverage_pivot_touched_first, which is explicitly Out of Scope (intent: "pivots, coverage ordering belong to S3") and whose stub was correctly moved to execute:false. No other findings. All merge-relevant test/format/deps gates pass.

Merge gates:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors: clean (make smoke)
- mix test: 3 properties, 918 tests, 0 failures
- mix format --check-formatted: clean
- mix deps.unlock --check-unused: clean
- mix spec.check: sole remaining warning is the S3-owned coverage_pivot_touched_first (out of scope for this stage)

Verdict: PASS

Notes:
- mix spec.check exits non-zero solely due to the coverage_pivot_touched_first warning, which is explicitly S3's scope per the ticket's Out of Scope (intent) and was deliberately split onto an execute:false stub. Not a gap in 7md.2.
- The degraded_leg_state test (html_layout_test.exs:309) asserts change_verdict.differential? == false because the two_subject_repo fixture commits no base state.json; the "degraded does not flip the verdict" property is thus demonstrated on a non-differential fixture. degraded_leg_state additionally has dedicated coverage in html_test.exs (execute:true). Advisory only — not this ticket's owned requirement.

AUDIT: APPROVE
Session: aaudit-specled-7md-2-e702507fafcc21c6
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-src-specled-ex/b4c28666-8ce9-4a61-922a-352ab59212b4/subagents/agent-aaudit-specled-7md-2-e702507fafcc21c6.jsonl

Reasoning: Independently re-ran and read source, not just test assertions. The three
non-zero-exit conditions all hold: (a) coverage_pivot_touched_first is genuinely S3's per the
ticket's Out of Scope (intent) "pivots, coverage ordering belong to S3" and the UNBLOCKS entry
7md.3; (b) the spec diff moved that requirement onto its own execute:false stub
(html_coverage_pivot_test.exs) — text unchanged, not dropped; (c) I ran `mix spec.check` myself:
exactly ONE warning (verification_target_missing_reference for coverage_pivot_touched_first),
no others. So the non-zero exit is legitimate and non-blocking.

Deep checks by reading code:
- Overview no-triangle/inventory claim is non-vacuous: render_overview (html.ex:290-301) calls
  only headline/tiles/findings/spec-edits/file-breakdown/decisions — it never calls
  render_sync_diagram/render_strength_inventory/render_repo_inventory, which are invoked solely
  from render_spec_health (html.ex:481-494). Those strings DO render in the health pane
  (confirmed by tests at :178-180 and the degraded test at :316), so the Overview refute at
  html_layout_test.exs:167-169 is a real distinction, not an uncalled-function artifact.
- Degraded legs use neutral grey, not amber: sync-edge-degraded → var(--fg-faint)/var(--fg-muted)
  and a `?` glyph (html.ex:822, 3381-3384); the banner uses --neutral-bg/--fg-faint (3502-3521).
  :fail is the amber path (#ea580c/#c2410c, 3376/3408). Genuinely distinct.
- Dedup key is (code, reason): Enum.group_by(fn f -> {f["code"], f["reason"]} end) with
  count=length(items) and subjects uniq'd (html.ex:570-582). Tests at :188/:217 exercise it.
- Theme: both light (:root, html.ex:2935) and dark (@media prefers-color-scheme:dark gating
  :root:not([data-theme=light]), 2967-2968; plus :root[data-theme=dark] override, 2995) token
  sets; real 3-state toggle (data-theme-choice buttons 278-280) wired to a click handler that
  setItem/getItem 'specled-theme' and stamps data-theme (js 5113-5136) with a no-flash head
  bootstrap (5097-5108). body paints from var(--bg)/var(--fg) (3023).

Scope: diff touches exactly 4 files (spec_review.spec.md stub-flip-only, state.json regen,
html.ex, new html_layout_test.exs) — all in Allowed globs; review.ex / verifier*.ex /
coverage_triangulation.ex untouched. No <form>/fetch/XHR/WebSocket/frameworks added. Each of the
5 owned must-requirements has a test that fails on violation (queue: exactly-one-active at :118;
overview split at :154; health at :172; dedup at :188/:217; theme at :229/:243/:258). Suites
green: html_layout 14/0, html_test+task 77/0. Verifier's PASS is well-founded; the
degraded-verdict-on-non-differential-fixture Note is correctly advisory (degraded_leg_state is
S-sibling-owned, not one of this ticket's 5, and its glyph/neutral rendering is verified in code).
APPROVED. Merged into specled_-7md/spec-review-redesign. Closing per orchestrator sign-off.

title: S2: Renderer shell — review queue, Overview + Spec health panes, theme tokens
